perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with an outdoor POV shot of a hand gesturing towards a distant view of Mount Fuji under a cloudy sky. (2) It transitions to a series of quick cuts showcasing the interior of a wooden cabin, including a large living room, a window view, a dart board game, the sink area, a bathtub, a toilet with a bidet, and a bedroom with two beds. (3) The scene shifts back outdoors to show various trailer-style accommodations, one featuring 'CHUMS' branding, followed by a woman posing in front of a white tent with Mount Fuji in the background. (4) A child is shown rolling on a green lawn, followed by shots of an indoor aquarium with fish and jellyfish, and a purple-lit light tunnel at night. (5) Finally, a staff member is shown delivering trays of food to a table, and a man is seen eating in the cabin, ending with a nighttime exterior shot of the resort.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic pop music with a repetitive 'up and down' vocal chop starts immediately and continues throughout the entire video. (2) Discrete, cartoon-like 'pop' and 'ting' sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of text overlays on the screen. (3) No human speech or environmental ambient noise is audible over the loud background music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '渡假園區' (Resort Park) - Decorative Hook. (2) '大客廳' (Large Living Room) - Functional description. (3) '大面窗' (Large Window) - Functional description. (4) '遊戲' (Games) - Functional description. (5) '洗手' (Wash Hands) - Functional description. (6) '洗身體' (Wash Body) - Functional description. (7) '洗屁屁' (Wash Bottom) - Functional/Humorous description. (8) '富士山' (Mt. Fuji) - Functional description. (9) '兩張床' (Two Beds) - Functional description. (10) '還有車屋' (Also Trailer Houses) - Functional description. (11) '企鵝聯名車屋' (Penguin Co-branded Trailer House) - Functional description. (12) '又是富士山' (Fuji Again) - Decorative Hook. (13) '可以拍照' (Can Take Photos) - Functional description. (14) '可以打滾' (Can Roll Around) - Functional description. (15) '免費看魚' (Free Fish Viewing) - Functional Hook. (16) '水母漂' (Floating Jellyfish) - Functional description. (17) '晚上會開燈' (Lights On At Night) - Functional description. (18) '含晚餐' (Dinner Included) - Functional Hook. (19) '二大二小' (Two Adults Two Kids) - Functional information. (20) '一晚只要' (Only... Per Night) - Hook. (21) '8800' - Functional pricing. (22) '時之栖 OUTDOOR HILL VILLAGE' - Location Brand Logo.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid Room Tour -> Outdoor Facilities -> Night Activities -> Dining & Price Reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing in reflections and poses, 1 young boy rolling on grass, 1 male staff serving food, 1 male eating at the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman wearing a white hoodie and a blue skirt with braided hair.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Wooden interior of a log cabin with minimalist furniture; outdoor grassy areas with tents and trailers; panoramic view of Mt. Fuji.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors; warm interior lighting; vibrant neon/LED lighting in the night tunnel.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Amenity Showcase -> Activity Reel -> Price/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional travel vlog designed to showcase the features and value of the 'Outdoor Hill Village' resort in Gotemba, Japan. It uses fast-paced editing and beat-synced text to highlight family-friendly amenities, scenic views of Mt. Fuji, and full-board dining options to attract potential tourists looking for a budget-friendly yet high-quality getaway.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video includes the resort's name '時之栖 OUTDOOR HILL VILLAGE', detailed room/food shots, and a specific price point (8800), which are clear signs of a promotional collaboration or review.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of first-person POV hand gestures to introduce scenes and rapid-fire text overlays for each room feature.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a family-oriented audience with its '2 adults 2 kids' text and emphasis on playground/aquarium activities.
